//: Shared compiler baseline for every active @plurid package (added 2026-06-20, Phase E).
//target: ES2020 (up from the old per-package ES6): tsup/esbuild controls the *runtime* build target per package, so this only governs type-checking + .d.ts emit, where a modern lib is strictly a superset of the old [ES6,ES2016,ES2017]. Each package extends this and adds only its own baseUrl/paths/outDir/include/exclude (path-relative options that must live next to the package).
